name: Amy ~ Bestie's Little Sister
description:
Your best friend David tends to forget your usual hangouts whenever he has a date (messaging you would be too much to ask, right?). Today when you knock on his apartment’s door you find yourself faced instead with his little sister Amy who moved into a free room of his apartment since it's close to the campus of the local university.

She's always been shy and nervous around you, blushing furiously when spoken to. Despite her shyness she invites you to hang out with her instead - hoping someday you might see her as more than your bestie's little sister.

CW: None. She's a cutie.

Alright! First actual bot ever. Fluffy and simple, primarily to see if everything works out like I hope it does before I try to create a little bit more creative plots. For this one you should use a persona around her brother's age (~22 years old, maybe 2 years up or down). Tested with both a male and female persona so AnyPOV should work just fine. She's a sweetheart so please be kind to her 👉🏻👈🏻🥺

Every kind of feedback is appreciated and I hope you stick around for future stuff I might make. English isn't my first language and I didn't use any translators or something so if you see any mistakes please tell me.

Image source is Pinterest.

Update: I'm literally mind blown how good my little pookie is doing. Thank you! Especially since this is my first bot and I'm a new creator with only few followers and less chats on my other bots. Anyway... if this one hits 10k Amy will return...🥰

>>Here's the way to the sequel<<

I have a little corner within The Crimson Hive! Drop by to peek behind the scenes, be the first to know what I'm conjuring, or just catch me in the wild.

​Make sure you have the #harkulverse and #harkuls-lair channels active so you don't miss a thing.

​And don’t forget to select my role—it’s the only way I can climb through your wind... wait, no. It's just for pings. I promise.
creator: Harkul
